patches_removed.name: Restyle Search/Games tab icons to Tools/About
patches_removed.description: Overrides the native Search/Games bottom-nav icons with the Modx Tools/About artwork.

patches_removed.name: Restyle Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About
patches_removed.description: Renames the native Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About.

patches_added.name: Show message read receipts
patches_added.description: Shows the members who have or have not read each chat message.

patches_removed.name: Enable recording pause/resume feature
patches_removed.description: Enable recording pause/resume feature in KakaoTalk

patches_removed.name: Play YouTube player in chat room
patches_removed.description: Allows playing YouTube videos in KakaoTalk chat rooms.

patches_modified.name: Add Packet Handler
patches_modified.description:
Adding the Loco Packet Handler allows external applications to handle the app's packets, which may compromise security.
Conflicts may occur on some systems.

patches_modified.name: Add Pine Lib
patches_modified.description: add libpine.so to the app's native libraries

patches_modified.name: Add settings resources
patches_modified.description: Adds Morphe settings layout resources to the app.

patches_modified.name: Add settings tab
patches_modified.description: Adds a settings tab to the app.

patches_modified.name: Allow Hide on Any Chat
patches_modified.description: Users with hiding privileges can hide any chat, including their own messages.

patches_modified.name: Allow reply to feed
patches_modified.description: Allows replying to feed messages

patches_modified.name: Always Show Kick Button
patches_modified.description: Always shows the kick button in group member management.

patches_modified.name: Bypass Moat check
patches_modified.description: Add a setting to bypass the Moat integrity check that can prevent KakaoPay from running.

patches_modified.name: Bypass input mention limit in non-multichat
patches_modified.description: Bypass the limit of input mentions in non-multichat rooms

patches_modified.name: Change model
patches_modified.description: Changes the device model to supporting subdevice features

patches_modified.name: Change package name
patches_modified.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For KakaoTalk only

patches_modified.name: Custom branding
patches_modified.description: Customize app branding (name)

patches_modified.name: Default external browser
patches_modified.description: Sets the default external browser for KakaoTalk to the system's default browser.

patches_modified.name: Disable 300+ unread limit
patches_modified.description: Always show the real unread count instead of '300+' in chatroom list

patches_modified.name: Disable 99 unread limit
patches_modified.description: Skip the 99-cap so unread count shows full value

patches_modified.name: Disable ChatRoomAdController
patches_modified.description: Disables the open-link chat room BizBoard ad controller.

patches_modified.name: Disable Collapse Button
patches_modified.description: Disable collapse button on OpenChatList

patches_modified.name: Disable Community Tab
patches_modified.description: Disables Community Tab

patches_modified.name: Disable Friend Feed tab
patches_modified.description: Disables the Friend Feed tab in KakaoTalk.

patches_modified.name: Disable Friend Lists ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the friend tab BizBoard ads in KakaoTalk.

patches_modified.name: Disable OpenChat feed ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the OpenChat tab feed ad load and render paths.

patches_modified.name: Disable Pay banner ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the KakaoPay banner ad load and render paths.

patches_modified.name: Disable S2Event
patches_modified.description: Disables Tracker

patches_modified.name: Disable SDK Tracker
patches_modified.description: Disables the SDK Tracker in KakaoTalk.

patches_modified.name: Disable Sentry
patches_modified.description: Disables Sentry error reporting in KakaoTalk.

patches_modified.name: Disable ShortForm ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the shortform ad load and render paths.

patches_modified.name: Disable Talk Share Log
patches_modified.description: Disable talk share log

patches_modified.name: Disable chat room list ad
patches_modified.description: Disable the chat room list ad.

patches_modified.name: Disable open chat room comments
patches_modified.description: Adds a setting to disable comments in open chat rooms.

patches_modified.name: Disable verifying signature
patches_modified.description: Disables the signature verification check that prevents the app from running.

patches_modified.name: Enable Markdown
patches_modified.description: Render plain text messages with markdown-style formatting.

patches_modified.name: Enable reaction mention flag
patches_modified.description: Enables the reaction mention flag in KakaoTalk chat logs.

patches_modified.name: Enable send big text
patches_modified.description: Allows sending big text messages in KakaoTalk.

patches_modified.name: Force enable debug mode
patches_modified.description: Enables debug mode in the app.

patches_modified.name: Force enable emoticon plus feature
patches_modified.description: Force enable emoticon plus feature (Unpurchased emoticon can be sent once per day)

patches_modified.name: Ghost Mode
patches_modified.description: Don't expose your typing status to the other party.

patches_modified.name: Hide More tab Game tab
patches_modified.description: Hides the Game tab from the More tab.

patches_modified.name: Hide More tab components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide components from the More tab.

patches_modified.name: Hook Package Manager
patches_modified.description: Hooks the Package Manager to bypass integrity checks.

patches_modified.name: Open profile from open chat feed
patches_modified.description: Opens open chat member profiles from join and leave feed messages.

patches_modified.name: Override feature flag
patches_modified.description: Overrides the feature flag to enable the feature.

patches_modified.name: Register settings activity
patches_modified.description: Registers the Morphe settings activity in the app manifest.

patches_modified.name: Remove BizBoard ads
patches_modified.description: Removes the BizBoard ad by forcing its dimensions to 0x0 and visibility to GONE in onMeasure.

patches_modified.name: Remove More tab ad
patches_modified.description: Removes the ad from the More tab.

patches_modified.name: Remove OpenLink chat room list ad
patches_modified.description: Removes the OpenLink chat room list ad.

patches_modified.name: Remove Short-form Tab
patches_modified.description: Removes the Short-form tab from the now fragment.

patches_modified.name: Remove feed ad
patches_modified.description: Removes the feed ad from the app.

patches_modified.name: Remove focus ad
patches_modified.description: Removes the focus ad from the app.

patches_modified.name: Remove native ad
patches_modified.description: Removes the native ad from the app.

patches_modified.name: Remove shop tab
patches_modified.description: Removes the shop tab from the bottom navigation bar.

patches_modified.name: Show chatroom channel ID
patches_modified.description: Shows the channel ID in chatroom settings and copies it when tapping the chat side title.

patches_modified.name: Show deleted, hidden, or edited messages
patches_modified.description: Allows you to see deleted, hidden, and edited message history in chat logs.

patches_modified.name: Spoof App ID
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the App ID to bypass integrity checks. (to bypass biometric auth etc.)

patches_modified.name: Spoof apk checksums
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the apk checksums to pass integrity checks.

patches_modified.name: Spoof signature
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the app signature to pass integrity checks.

patches_modified.name: Version info patch
patches_modified.description: Patches the version info to include '(ReVanced)' in the version string.
